case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LAVIENE, ISSAIC (MINOR) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,074.30 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LAVIENE, ISSAIC (MINOR) MCCORMICK, CLARITA (MOTHER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCORMICK, CLARITA (MOTHER)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAVIENE, ISSAIC (MINOR) MCCORMICK, CLARITA (MOTHER) $2,074.30 PRINCIPAL, $31.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,105.30, ISSAIC LAVIENE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
